title: What it actually looks like to win the phone war
caption:
The phone isn't the problem. What you're running from is.

You already know your screen time is too high. You've already tried the app timers. They didn't work — not because you're weak, but because you were treating the symptom.

Boredom is a symptom. Anxiety is a symptom. The conversation you keep not having is the real thing.

Win the war before it starts: set the battlefield, build a better first move, and name what the scroll is actually medicating. The man who picks up Scripture before the phone isn't more disciplined — he just decided before the desire arrived.

Save this for the morning you reach for the phone before you've opened your eyes.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #selfcontrol #manofgod #godlymen #phonewar #christianity
